mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO daily_weather ( district_code, base_date, day_offset, temp_max, temp_min, weather_code, sunrise, sunset, sunshine_duration, daylight_duration, prec_sum, snow_sum, radiation_sum, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
(#{item.districtCode}, #{item.baseDate}, #{item.dayOffset}, #{item.tempMax}, #{item.tempMin}, #{item.weatherCode}, #{item.sunrise}, #{item.sunset}, #{item.sunshineDuration}, #{item.daylightDuration}, #{item.precSum}, #{item.snowSum}, #{item.radiationSum}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE temp_max = COALESCE(VALUES(temp_max), temp_max), temp_min = COALESCE(VALUES(temp_min), temp_min), weather_code = COALESCE(VALUES(weather_code), weather_code), sunrise = COALESCE(VALUES(sunrise), sunrise), sunset = COALESCE(VALUES(sunset), sunset), sunshine_duration = COALESCE(VALUES(sunshine_duration), sunshine_duration), daylight_duration = COALESCE(VALUES(daylight_duration), daylight_duration), prec_sum = COALESCE(VALUES(prec_sum), prec_sum), snow_sum = COALESCE(VALUES(snow_sum), snow_sum), radiation_sum = COALESCE(VALUES(radiation_sum), radiation_sum), updated_at = COALESCE(VALUES(updated_at), updated_at)
